title: Database schema: auth_accounts, auth_tokens, auth_usage + extend agents table
acceptance_criteria: auth_accounts table: account_id, email (UNIQUE), name, tier, stripe_customer_id, stripe_subscription_id, agents_count, created_at, updated_at
auth_tokens table: token_id, agent_id (FK to identity.agents), token_hash (UNIQUE), created_at, last_used_at, revoked_at
auth_usage table: account_id, period_start, request_count with composite PK
Extend identity.agents: add account_id, stripe_customer_id, webhook_url, webhook_secret_hash, custom_scopes TEXT[]
